programme.desc: Go test-drives a supersonic rocket car designed by Pops Racer for the Vavoom Motor Company to challenge speed records. However, the car gets seriously damaged during the test run, and the test ends in failure.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: After checking the track of Transafrica Grand Prix, Go boards an airplane with a biology professor named Carnivore. Suddenly, the pilots threaten Carnivore at gunpoint and parachute off the plane with him.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: On the way to an evil mountain where monsters are said to dwell, Go chases a weird tank appeared in the jungle and finds a secret base at a lake.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go and Trixie participate in the Monte Carlo Rally, but the Mach 5 is hijacked in the Alps during a snowstorm by a man with an injured right hand.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: An assassin with a rifle is attempting to shoot the Princess who is in the royal box to wave the starting flag for the Mystic Grand Prix. However, the plot fails due to mirror reflection.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go escapes from a trap set by an assassin gang and prevents the assassination of the President of Avalonia, the next target of the assassins.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: To participate in a race in the United States, Go and Trixie board a passenger plane. Dr. Fantasty, a developer of a new type of rocket fuel, is also aboard.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: There is an ongoing mystery that unmanned cars suddenly drive away and disappear. To date, 48,000 cars have gone missing. The police request Go to track down those unmanned cars as they are not able to catch them.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go joins the Pineapple Grand Prix, a series of grueling courses. In honor of the legend that originated the race, racers are obligated to carry pineapples during the race. Then, it turns out that one of the pineapples has a stolen jewel inside.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: On a plane to Hong Kong to join a race, Go witnesses a man being murdered with a poisoned needle, but someone kills the assassin lady to seal her mouth.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go and Trixie arrive at an airport to head for Hawaii and stumble across a shooting incident aiming at a stranger man and a girl. After their arrival to Hawaii, they find the man they saw earlier dead.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Gadge is the father of Gismo, a boy Go met at a car show. Gadge has a grudge against Go as he was fired from his team after losing a race to Go, and he has devoted himself to 'car wrestling,' in which cars smash and destroy each other.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: An international space development base is under construction in the American West. In the plains, the equipment to be transported to the base has been robbed by a group called Motorcycle Apaches.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A lightening awakens the 'Monster Car,' a huge monster-like tank resting in an old castle at the foot of the Alps. The Monster Car descends into the city and runs amok bringing total destruction.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: A daughter of a wealthy man, Baron Vondervon, disappeared 12 years ago. In memory of her who dreamed of becoming a racer, Vondervon decides to hold a 'Junk Car Grand Prix', in which only girls of 17 years old are eligible to participate.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: By air, Go and his fellows are on the way to the Grand Prix, but their plane breaks down due to lightning, falling onto an uninhabited island with other passengers.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Go receives a challenge letter from the Car Acrobatic Team, a team that he defeated in the Alpine Race one year ago. Go heads for the designated spot although Racer X tried to stop him.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: Mr. Goldminter, the richest man in the world, holds the Around the World Grand Prix. The champion will win tons of gold and his daughter, Lovelace. Upon a request, Go joins the race with his pride as a racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer [Japanese-Language Version]
programme.desc: In order to win, the racers try to sabotage the race by any means necessary. Go continues to race with his belief in fair play, but this motto comes to corner him. Go aims to reach the goal driving the Mach 5, overcoming various obstacles.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed Racer, a young and upcoming driver, drives a white-body super racing car named Mach 5. Speed enters his first race to win money for his family, against his father, Pops Racer.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed enters the Sword Mountain Race behind his father's back. However, Ace and his gang attack the Mach 5, aiming to steal the blueprints of Pops Racer's new engine.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: A masked racer, whose identity is in mystery, and whose face is concealed by a mask, came to Japan. He was a top racer but was also rumored to cause car crashes whenever he races.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed was saved by a masked racer who is revealed to be Speed’s older brother, Rex Racer. When Speed was at Rex’s house, he was mistaken for Rex and kidnapped by an intruder.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed tries to help a kind old man to find his stolen car. It turns out that the man is a son of a once infamous gang boss, and the classic car he drives has a map to a stash of treasure.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Speed and the old man are captured by Blaggard, the boss of a gang. Speed fights back against the thugs and discovers where the treasure is hidden and offers Blaggard a deal.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Still in Scotland, experts Natasha Raskin Sharp and Philip Serrell find rare first edition books, watercolors by local artists and a plate of delicious homemade scones. And the pair take a trip across the water to a Belfast auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp and Phil Serrell shop in Northern Ireland before an auction in Wales. They uncover a Majolica tea service, Irish fiddle and a bowler hat. A bidding frenzy helps one expert take the win and the Road Trip crown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott hit the road again, this time in a Vanden Plas Princess. They are winding each other up, cracking bad jokes and looking for exquisite antiques in Wales. It's going to be a hair-raising adventure!

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott crisscross the Welsh border looking for antique goodies, but finding things that don't require two strong assistants to carry them is not easy.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: It's all gold and silver on Irita Marriott and Baj Bisram's third leg. But it's not all heavy metal - they find their groove in Birmingham's reggae heartland before a surprise auction result.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott embark on a five-county tour of The Fens. On the way, they discover secret doors, prehistoric artifacts and time travel.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Irita Marriott and Raj Bisram head to the seaside in Lincolnshire. It's the last chance to hit the shops before their final auction showdown.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Jewelry expert Izzie Balmer and mid-century fan Mark Hill head to Wales in a 1987 Lotus Éclat to start off their new trip in Pembrokeshire. Magic tricks and a folding cake stand go to auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: New best friends Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill battle for bargain antiques in the towns and villages of Carmarthenshire, including special negligee jewelry, pitch pine furniture, a woven tapestry and glassware.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill raid the antiques shops of Stroud, Cirencester and beyond. Their finds include 1950s modernist pendant, a Victorian tea kettle, a Royal Worcester Cup and a 19th century food container.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Travelling through Oxfordshire and the Midlands, Izzie Balmer and Mark Hill pick up a Doulton Lambeth inkwell, a Betjeman lockable decanter, a Minton majolica plate for serving strawberries, a set of French boutique display boxes and more.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: On Mark Hill and Izzy Balmer's final day, they fall in love with cuddly toys, dumbwaiters and early 20th century glass. But only one of them can reign victorious after the final auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: David Harper pairs up with Hettie Jago, who is new to the Trip. Starting off in Perth, Hettie spots a pair of fish jugs, while David tries to compete with a beaded tapestry featuring man's best friend.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar un cuerpo en Atlanta cubierto de rasguños. La UAC cree que esta muerte y posteriores homicidios podrían estar relacionados con una persona que tiene un trastorno obsesivo de la piel.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el estreno de la octava temporada, con Paloma Reynosa aún suelta, Gibbs debe tomar medidas desesperadas para proteger a sus seres queridos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El secuestro de una niña se convierte en algo más grande cuando su abuelo complica la investigación.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando los motivos de un atentado contra una técnica de explosivos la relacionan con un asesinato, el equipo del NCIS investiga su muy reservada vida personal.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Imprudente
programme.desc: Frank debe descubrir la verdad cuando un agente encubierto acusa a un compañero de brutalidad policial. Además, Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de un famoso fotógrafo acusado recientemente de agresión por sus antiguas modelos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Niebla de guerra
programme.desc: Danny y Baez trabajan con el Ranger de Texas Waylon Gates (Lyle Lovett) cuando les encargan un caso para encontrar al Asesino de la Estrella Solitaria.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Intereses personales
programme.desc: Jamie está siendo investigado después de que su chaleco de policía sea encontrado en un delincuente, y Frank se debate entre ayudar y proteger a un viejo amigo, Chuck Kennedy (Ed Asner), cuya casa ha sido invadida.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los primeros 100 días
programme.desc: Frank y Garrett idean un plan para convencer al alcalde Chase de que colabore mejor con los demás para dirigir correctamente la ciudad.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar un cuerpo en Atlanta cubierto de rasguños. La UAC cree que esta muerte y posteriores homicidios podrían estar relacionados con una persona que tiene un trastorno obsesivo de la piel.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un chico que desapareció en San Diego el día de Halloween reaparece un año después, la UAC debe funcionar con rapidez cuando otro chico en truco o trato desaparece bajo circunstancias similares.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está perpleja al encontrar el denominador común entre las víctimas masculinas en Montana, lo que hace difícil el perfil del sospechoso. JJ debe enfrentar sus sentimientos respecto a la trágica muerte de su hermana.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver de un oficial estadounidense se relaciona con un buque de la Marina británica, el asesinato se convierte en un incidente internacional.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/22/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Andalucia during Semana Santa, Holy Week, to visit longtime director Zach Zamboni, who currently lives in Granada.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 09/29/2013. With a combination of cultures, New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. Go with Anthony Bourdain as he explores.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/06/2013. Home to chef Rene Redzepi of Noma, Copenhagen is known as the cultural center of Denmark. Anthony Bourdain explores its fantastic food and natural beauty.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 10/13/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Sicily, where he goes fishing for his supper and sets out to find a home-cooked meal.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/12/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores the "Interzone,” where artists like Burroughs, Bowles and the Rolling Stones sought escape from Western moral prohibitions.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 3/26/2023. Mexico City is one of the world’s emerging food destinations, and it’s also Eva Longoria’s second home. Longoria takes us to some of her favorite eating spots, but in this constantly evolving city, there is always more to explore.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/2/2023. In the jungles of Yucatán State, on the eastern edge of Mexico, Longoria explores the home of the ancient Maya, where a fierce pride in that ancestry still permeates every custom and dish, even in the most innovative kitchens.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/9/2023. Travelling to the mountains of Southern Mexico, Longoria discovers the hidden magic of Oaxaca that boasts some of the finest ingredients in Mexico, including chocolate, corn, tomatoes and the much-loved quesillo cheese.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/16/2023. Eva Longoria visits the northeastern state of Nuevo Leon, bordering her home state of Texas. As little grows there, and with meat on every menu, inventive and resourceful chefs transform simple ingredients into culinary delights.

programme.title: Eva Longoria: Searching for Mexico
programme.desc: Aired 4/23/2023. Eva Longoria visits the state of Jalisco, where much of what is seen is quintessentially ‘Mexican’ originated. She also discovers that the state capital, Guadalajara, boasts some of the country’s most cutting-edge restaurants.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Dos Pasiones aka Cadetes de la Naval
programme.desc: Los mejores amigos de Cristobal y Ricardo son compañeros infantes de marina que aprenden el significado del honor, el deber y, sobre todo, la amistad en este mundo agitación drama de la Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Dos pesos dejada
programme.desc: Fermín, un taxista vividor, se enamora de la hija de una comerciante adinerada, pero sus intenciones de conquistarla pronto se vuelven obsesivas y pierden el rumbo, llevándolo a consecuencias inminentes y peligrosas.

programme.title: El aduanal
programme.desc: La hija del jefe de la aduana está obligada a casarse con el hijo de un traficante de drogas, luego de que este la viola. El ex novio de la muchacha, un policía de aduanas, está tras la pista de este infame. Se desata una cacería sin tregua.

programme.title: El caballo prieto afamado
programme.desc: Un melodrama ambientado en una zona rural que nos muestra a través de su más afamado y de majestuosa belleza equina, todas las aventuras en el marco de música, jinetes y carreras.

programme.title: Dos Pasiones aka Cadetes de la Naval
programme.desc: Los mejores amigos de Cristobal y Ricardo son compañeros infantes de marina que aprenden el significado del honor, el deber y, sobre todo, la amistad en este mundo agitación drama de la Guerra Mundial.

programme.title: Mi esposa y la otra
programme.desc: Un hombre casado contrata a su prima para que lo defienda, cuando se descubre que tiene una amante con tres hijos.

programme.title: La agonía de ser madre
programme.desc: Gravemente enferma, una mujer pide a Dios que le dé vida para solucionar todos los problemas que provocó el alcoholismo de su esposo y sacar a su familia adelante.

programme.title: El embajador del miedo
programme.desc: Mientras toda la nación ve avanzar la campaña presidencial hacia las elecciones, un soldado corre contra el tiempo para descubrir una conspiración detrás de ella, una conspiración que podría destruir a la democracia misma.

programme.title: Guerra de razas
programme.desc: Inspirado en hechos reales. Para evitar que terroristas nacionales construyan una bomba sucia, un agente del FBI (Daniel Radcliffe) se infiltra en un grupo extremista, haciéndose pasar por uno de ellos.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Amor sin escalas
programme.desc: Ryan (ganador del Oscar, George Clooney) vuela a todos lados por trabajo, pero luego de conocer a una pasajera se da cuenta de que la vida no se trata del viaje, sino de las conexiones que se hagan en el camino.

programme.title: Aventura en Alaska
programme.desc: Tras graduarse de la Universidad Emory en 1992, el estudiante estrella y atleta Christopher McCandless abandonó sus posesiones, entregó sus ahorros de $24.000 a la caridad y se fue a dedo hasta Alaska a vivir en la naturaleza.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: Adapted from William Styron's best-selling novel, this passionate tale of a writer's love for a holocaust survivor is an exhilarating and compelling revelation.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: La terminal
programme.desc: Luego de llegar al aeropuerto JFK de Nueva York, Viktor Navorski se encuentra atrapado involuntariamente en vaivenes burocráticos que no le permiten regresar a su país ni entrar a los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La niñera y el presidente
programme.desc: Una cosmetóloga de Nueva York, tomada por error como maestra de ciencia, recibe una propuesta de trabajo para darles clase a los hijos de un dictador de Europa Oriental.

programme.title: Vírgenes suicidas
programme.desc: A mediados de los '70, en una tranquila comunidad de Michigan, viven las hermanas Lisbon, cinco adolescentes cuya belleza ha cautivado a un grupo de muchachos del pueblo.

programme.title: Serendipity ES
programme.desc: En el transcurso de una noche mágica, Jonathan (John Cusack) y Sara (Kate Beckinsale) se conocen de manera inesperada, luego cada uno se va por su lado, dejando que el destino guíe su futuro, si es que se supone que terminen juntos.

programme.title: Lars y una chica de verdad
programme.desc: Lars (Ryan Gosling), un chico dulce y ermitaño, se pierde en un cómico triángulo amoroso al encontrar a la chica de sus sueños en una muñeca llamada Bianca, a la vez que comienza a sentirse atraído por su compañera de trabajo, Margo.

programme.title: Vírgenes suicidas
programme.desc: A mediados de los '70, en una tranquila comunidad de Michigan, viven las hermanas Lisbon, cinco adolescentes cuya belleza ha cautivado a un grupo de muchachos del pueblo.

programme.title: El último desafío
programme.desc: Tras abandonar su puesto en el Depto de Narcóticos de DPLA, el sheriff Ray Owens (Schwarzenegger) se muda y establece en un pueblo tranquilo de la frontera, Sommerton Junction.

programme.title: Ejecutor
programme.desc: Despedido hace algún tiempo del FBI, Mark Kaminsky se pone en contacto con su anterior jefe, Shannon, cuyo hijo ha sido asesinado. Decidido a encontrar al asesino, Shannon necesita la ayuda de Kaminsky y se ofrece a reincorporarlo si tiene éxito.

programme.title: El sobreviviente
programme.desc: Un hombre condenado erróneamente, tiene que intentar sobrevivir a una ejecución pública en un programa de juegos de televisión.

programme.title: Ronin
programme.desc: Un equipo de agentes especiales internacionales debe llevar a cabo una misión misteriosa: robar un maletín fuertemente custodiado buscado tanto por el IRA como por la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Redención
programme.desc: Jason Statham interpreta a un cobrador que trabaja para un jefe de la mafia local en este thriller de acción de alto octanaje. Afectado por el asesinato de un amigo y consumido por deseos de venganza, se sumerge en un mundo de violencia.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Inspirada en la experiencia de Oliver Stone, cuenta la historia de Chris Taylor (Charlie Sheen), un joven recluta enviado a Vietnam que presencia las atrocidades de la guerra, muchas perpetradas por aquellos que llama 'camaradas'.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Una mujer sin filtro
programme.desc: Paz, una amable mujer, permitió que todos alrededor de ella la trataran como si no fuera nada, manteniendo el silencio para no herir ningún sentimiento. Hasta que un día, un fenómeno fuerza su cabeza a expresar lo que siente.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Fuera del cielo
programme.desc: El drama de 24 horas comienza a las 6 de la mañana con el joven Cucú, cuyo hermano Malboro lo recibe después de una separación de cinco años. Una vez reunidos, planean un robo que los lleva a una serie de encuentros con diferentes personas.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Argentina, 1985
programme.desc: A legal team takes on the heads of Argentina's bloody military dictatorship during the 1980s in a battle against odds and a race against time.

programme.title: Viernes 13: Parte 2
programme.desc: Cinco años después del baño de sangre en Camp Crystal, todo lo que queda es la leyenda de Jason y su madre demente, que había asesinado a siete consejeros del campamento.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte 3
programme.desc: Ignorando el sangriento legado de Camp Crystal Lake, uno por uno son víctimas del maníaco Jason que los acecha a cada paso ...

programme.title: Viernes 13: El capítulo final
programme.desc: Después de su renacimiento en una morgue del hospital, el asesino de la máscara de hockey fija su atención vengativa en la familia Jarvis y un grupo de adolescentes hasta ahora despreocupados.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte V: un nuevo comienzo
programme.desc: Esta vez parece haber puesto la mira en los pacientes jóvenes de una casa aislada. Y más de unos pocos de sus objetivos adolescentes terminan por la mitad, en cuartos ... lo que sea, Jason lo hace.

programme.title: Viernes 13 parte VI: Jason vive
programme.desc: De niño, Tommy Jarvis hizo algo que muchos murieron intentando hacer: mató a Jason Vorhees, el asesino que aterrorizó a Crystal Lake. Ahora, años después, Tommy está atormentado por el temor de que Jason siga vivo.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VII: la nueva sangre
programme.desc: Desde que el maníaco homicida Jason Voorhees quedó atrapado en cadenas en el fondo de Crystal Lake, el campamento de verano cercano ha funcionado sin problemas ... sin asesinatos.

programme.title: Viernes 13, parte VIII: Jason invade Manhattan
programme.desc: La Gran Manzana está en grandes problemas, ya que el indestructible psicópata Jason Voorhees sale a la ciudad de Nueva York y pinta la ciudad de "rojo".

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: Zack y Miri hacen una porno
programme.desc: Para resolver sus problemas económicos, Zack y Miri, una pareja de amigos de toda la vida, deciden producir una película porno.

programme.title: Al calor de las armas
programme.desc: Dos criminales secuestran a la mujer equivocada.

programme.title: Torrente 5
programme.desc: El policía corrupto sale de la cárcel en el 2018 para encontrar una España diferente a la que conocía.

programme.title: Beavis y Butt-head, la película
programme.desc: Cuando se roban su TV, Beavis y Butt-head emprenden camino en una hilarante película debut que les muestra a millones de fanáticos lo que ya saben: ¡Beavis y Butt-head son le mejor!

programme.title: South Park: Más grande, más larga y sin censura
programme.desc: Stan, Kyle, Kenny y Cartman ven una película prohibida para menores que les deforma sus frágiles cabezas. Sus padres no tardan en declarar la guerra a Canadá y los chicos son la última esperanza que tiene Estados Unidos para frenar el Armagedón.

programme.title: The Champion
programme.desc: Christian es un futbolista talentoso, imprevisible y rebelde. Tras su última "metedura de pata", el presidente de su equipo decide asignarle un tutor personal que le ayude a controlar su temperamento.

programme.title: Pena ajena
programme.desc: Shaun, un surfer talentoso pero desenfocado, encuentra inspiración en la novela de Martin Skinner y deja Orange County para estudiar Arte Creativo en Stanford.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Hang 'Em High
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood stars in this brazen tale about a rampaging band of vigilantes who make two mistakes: they hang the wrong man and they don't finish the job. Inger Stevens, Pat Hingle, Bruce Dern & Dennis Hopper co-star in this action-packed western.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven Ride!
programme.desc: When his wife is killed, Marshal Chris Adams (Lee Van Cleef) discovers that a ruthless horde of marauders has killed all the men -- and will come back for the women -- in a nearby border town...unless The Magnificent Seven can stop them!

programme.title: A Bridge Too Far
programme.desc: With an all-star cast that includes Sean Connery, Anthony Hopkins, Laurence Olivier, Gene Hackman, and Robert Redford, this epic WW II drama recreates Operation Market Garden, an ambitious plan to hasten the end of WW II that ended in disaster.

programme.title: The Bounty
programme.desc: The story of a 1789 mutiny on the H.M.S. Bounty in which a voyage to Tahiti turns a crew against its Captain when they find tropical paradise and unlimited sex, but the Captain decides to leave and take his crew on a perilous voyage around Cape Horn.

programme.title: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: Producer-director Otto Preminger’s epic treatment of the bombing of Pearl Harbor details the devastating attack on the Hawaiian naval base as well as the explosive, behind-the-scenes stories.

programme.title: The Bridges at Toko-Ri
programme.desc: This masterful story of a war-weary World War II veteran who must leave his family to fight again combines moving drama with surefire, bombs-away aerial action. Also starring Grace Kelly as his loving, luminescent wife.

programme.title: Stalag 17
programme.desc: Laced with comedy and cynicism, this is the story of a group of GIs who are thrown together in the notorious German prison camp Stalag 17, their suspicions about one being a spy and their efforts to escape.

programme.title: Judgment At Nuremberg
programme.desc: Judge Daniel Haywood (Spencer Tracy) presides over the trial of four German jurists accused of 'legalizing' Nazi atrocities. But mounting political pressure for leniency forces Haywood into making the most difficult decision of his career.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Bumbling British Colonel Crittendon again disrupts Hogan's plans to get out an Allied officer who is also named Crittendon.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans have whipped up a plot to send German pilots in RAF fighters to shoot down British bombers.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: To help the Allied invasion at Normandy,Hogan convinces the Germans that Klink has been promoted to Chief of Staff.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: A Gestapo female operative tries to lure secrets out of Sergeant Schultz.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Germans plot to send an impostor of a captured English officer to kill Winston Churchill. Hogan plots how to foil the plan and keep the real officer alive.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: General Burkhalter comes to Stalag 13 determined to marry off his sister to Klink. Hogan has to find a planted German agent in the Underground.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tempts a Swedish scientist to defect.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: When Eb places an ad in a magazine claiming to be a wealthy landowner, it catches the eye of a young socialite. When the young woman makes an unexpected visit to Hooterville, Eb is forced to keep up his ruse.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver and Lisa play host to four children from the city, who find themselves in Hooterville as part of a rural exposure program. The kids learn how to milk the cow, pick vegetables, plant seeds, and share sleeping quarters with four-legged friends.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Eb feels the time is right to settle down and marry Darlene. However, he has nowhere near the money it will take to make a down payment on a house. With the help of the Douglases, who have given him two acres of land, Eb applies for a loan.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa and Oliver try to sort out of the troubles of fools in love. The problems begin when Eb invites both his girlfriend and another young woman to the same dance, while Arnold the pig falls for not one, but two attractive bovines.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa tells a rather fanciful version of how she met and fell in love with Oliver. The Douglases' house guest, little Lori Baker from the city, is all ears. The tale begins with how Lisa's father, the king, was exiled, causing Lisa to flee to Paris.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After Lisa attends a Women's Liberation League meeting, she gives Oliver a scolding for denying her equal rights and demands to swap chores. While Lisa does a stellar job at Oliver's work, Oliver's attempts at hers leave something to be desired.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer is a look-out for burglars robbing the base.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer gets assigned to MP duty.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night

programme.desc: Una niña de 13 años desapareció de su casa en Colorado y la única evidencia que dejó el secuestrador fueron tres huellas digitales en la cortina de una ventana.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una niña de seis años corrió y se escondió cuando vio que su abuela era golpeada hasta causarle la muerte, pero el hombre la siguió, la golpeó y la agredió. Ella dijo que el agresor era su tío, quien fue condenado. Se retractó de su testimonio años después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, la joven madre, Tammy Tatum, fue encontrada agredida sexualmente y asesinada en su departamento de Longmont, Colorado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fantasma en la máquina
programme.desc: Se investiga la aparente sobredosis y suicidio de la esposa del reverendo Bill Guthrie, Sharon, y los detectives recuperan archivos incriminatorios de la computadora de Bill y se enteran de su infidelidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Dos residentes de Seattle mueren después de tomar un analgésico de venta libre. El análisis de laboratorio de las pastillas muestra que estaban contaminadas con una concentración letal de cianuro. Originalmente lanzado como Temporada 2, Episodio 9.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Emboscada en la escuela dominical
programme.desc: Cuando un hombre es asesinado a tiros en su propio garaje, la policía descubre que una herida sufrida por la afligida viuda puede haber sido autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un barco camaronero de dos hombres se hundió cuando una violenta tormenta de rápido movimiento azotó la costa de Luisiana. El capitán se ahogó y el marinero fue rescatado catorce horas después.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un incendio sospechoso arrasó un apartamento y mató a dos mujeres jóvenes. La causa del incendio y la identidad de las víctimas no estaban claras.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se descubre el cuerpo descompuesto de una adolescente, la policía no tiene pistas sobre su identidad.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Batallón de pruebas
programme.desc: Una madre de dos niños pequeños fue encontrada muerta en su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerta a Leann Fletcher, los investigadores usan análisis de salpicaduras de sangre y computación forense para encontrar el motivo de su asesinato: su esposo, estaba teniendo una aventura con la jueza Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1993, Kathryn Bishop de 82 años es encontrada muerta en su hogar de Pennsylvania. Pequeñas pistas en el cuerpo de la víctima le dirán a la policía lo que pasó esa noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1992, Laura Houghteling desapareció de su casa en Bethesda y nunca más se la volvió a ver. Los científicos forenses usan evidencia de su habitación para dirigir a la policía hacia un sospechoso principal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Spike reveals the identity of the mystery man she's been dating, Emma is shocked. Mr. Simpson - her teacher! Emma claims she’s okay with it, but if that’s true, why is suddenly being so rude to Mr. Simpson?

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley feels like an outcast. Nobody's willing to forget how she treated them at her party last year. Ash decides to take action, swallows her pride and apologizes to everyone. And it works. She boasts to Terri about her success- it’s like last year

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Haunted by memories of her recent sexual assault, Paige is desperately trying to appear normal. A girl band contest sounds like a great distraction. Terri wants to reunite PMS—including Ashley. Paige refuses and recruits Hazel instead.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby is tired of being an invisible computer geek so he decides to join a sports team. Girls love wrestlers - that includes Toby’s crush Kendra. To Toby's dismay, the few extra pounds he carries put him in the same weight class as athletic Sean.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s crush on Craig has reached huge proportions and everyone’s urging her to ask him out already! But Manny’s a romantic; she thinks the guy ought to do the asking

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Grade Nine International Day is coming up and Hazel isn’t thrilled. After all, Hazel’s Jamaican and everybody loves the islands - right? When the day arrives, Hazel’s display is a hit, but she isn’t acting like herself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma Nelson is reveling in her newest job as her mom's maid of honour and planner extraordinaire! Her mom, Spike, is marrying her high-school crush, Snake - who also just happens to be Emma's favourite teacher.

programme.desc: Liberty can’t believe it when she doesn’t make the Girls Floor Hockey team – she’s never failed at anything. So when Coach Hatzilakos asks her to be the Team Manager, Liberty throws all her energy into managing.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve is going large as he focuses on the biggest animals to have ever walked the earth. In his dino-den, he starts by meeting the Argentinosaurus, an animal so large that even its poo was deadly.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic was home to the most vicious and violent predators the world has ever seen. To survive, herbivores had to fight back. Steve Backshall goes on a mission to track down the deadliest of all dinosaur defenders.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve tries to chomp through a car like a T-rex, wield an axe like an Allosaurus and hitch a ride in Britain's biggest tank to showcase the might of a Spinosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve gets freaky on a mission to find the weirdest dinosaur ever. He kick-starts with a Gigantoraptor, an 8 metre tall giant that laid the biggest eggs in history.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve discovers just what it takes to be a terror from the skies. He straps himself into one of Britain's fastest wind tunnels where he goes head to head against Microraptor.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve travels to new depths as he discovers just what it takes to be an aquatic terror. His quest sees him rocket through water in spectacular style, just like an Opthalmosaurus.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve's on a mission to find dinosaurs that have something a little special: fearsome killers, with incredible abilities! Get ready for a sensory sensation! His quest sees him race in the dark like a Troodon.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve goes on an undercover mission to unearth the sneakiest dinosaurs that were far deadlier than they first appeared.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall is on the hunt for the most deadly animals to have ever walked the earth, dinosaurs. Steve goes on a mission to uncover what was deadlier than the dinosaurs, from monsoons and super-sized sandstorms to ballistic bacteria and gory gas.

programme.title: Deadly Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Steve Backshall looks back at the most awesome experiments over the series and chooses his highlights.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: A journey to discover the legendary lost city of Piramesse, a magnificent ancient capital built 3,000 years ago by the Egyptian pharaoh Ramesses the Great.

programme.title: Lost Cities of The Ancients
programme.desc: In the Lambeyeque valley in northern Peru lies a strange lost world, the forgotten ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids, including some of the biggest on the planet, colossal structures made out of mud bricks.

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: Scarlioni is planning to steal the Mona Lisa. Yet he has six in his cellar - all genuine.

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: Count Scarlioni is really Scaroth, last of the Jagaroth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: City of Death
programme.desc: Scaroth intends to travel back in time to save his own people from destruction.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Shada

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: A beam will be hung above another beam. Contestants are to devour the covered trays that conceal six different types of Fear Factor Sausage. Both team members will be seated in separate stunt cars on opposite ends of a track.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be standing on opposite platforms suspended in the air. Contestants will be locked in a cage and hung from a crane. Contestant will have to siphon fluid out of containers and into a funnel. A contestant will cross a beam above ground.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: The contestant stands on top of a moving semi truck jump and leaps. Approximately 300,000 superworms will be placed into the case with the contestants. Each contestant will be holding a paint ball gun and harnessed to a reverse bungee line.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will start on the roof of The Mandalay Bay. A tank is filled with Piranha and pig kidneys, which will need to be picked up off using their mouth. The contestants are allowed to eat up to six cave spiders.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Clip show of the greatest moments from Season 2.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams of family members compete for $50,000 as they careen into a quarry full of live ammunition while in the back of a truck, must devour nasty scorpions, and are strapped to the front of a cement truck as it smashes through structures.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Contestants will be placed in a plexiglass cabinet. One person retrieves roaches using only their mouth and transfers it to their partner's mouth, who in turn drops it into another bin. In this stunt, it will be a husband and wife team.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To jump from one roof to the other roof. To search for and eat coagulated blood balls hidden in earthworms. To escape from a submerged fuselage.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Poles will be attached and hung off the dump truck off the ground. Plexiglas box is buried in the sand and filled with water and sand. Contestants will be standing on a car that is suspended over the water by a crane.

programme.title: Fear Factor 2.0 USA
programme.desc: Four teams compete for $50,000 as they are locked in a cage and sunk, eat a disgusting meal consisting of roaches, grasshoppers, blood salsa and maggots and lastly must leap back and forth from a moving station wagon onto a bus.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: To stand naked in public. Contestants have to eat 0-5 live Madagascar hissing cockroaches. Players are wrapped in heavy chain around their ankles and submerged into a tank of water.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a 35 foot power pole, they must stand on top. Contestant will select a fortune cookie, each fortune is inscribed with a different pig part. The contestant stands on a skid at the back of a semi-truck.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Stunt takes place in a rectangular pig pen filled with pigs. Couple is placed back-to back and attached to an upright rotisserie. One contestant will be dragged through a field of mud.

programme.title: Fear Factor
programme.desc: Each contestant will climb a one hundred and ten foot tower. Each contestant will be asked to eat 6 worms in 4 minutes. Each contestant will have to find their way through an underground tunnel.

programme.desc: The Angels attempt to reunite a father and son before an asteroid destroys planet Earth.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Touched By An Angel
programme.desc: The Angels must band together to combat Monique, Monica's evil twin, and prevent her from breaking up a marriage.

programme.title: Touched By An Angel

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Mientras está en Nueva Jersey, el chef Ramsay visita Flamango's, un restaurante obsoleto que necesita ayuda.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay viaja a Filadelfia, Pensilvania, para visitar Hot Potato Cafe. Encuentra a un dueño agotado por la pasión que ha creado un ambiente tóxico lleno de negatividad.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ramsay descubre que el restaurante mexicano Mama Rita's sufre de una cocina desorganizada. Mientras tanto, la dueña puede tener que sacrificar una amistad para salvar su negocio.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay encuentra una segunda ubicación fallida de un restaurante familiar.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.desc: El chef Ramsay pasa por un restaurante francés y descubre que él y el jefe de cocina tienen una formación culinaria similar. Sin embargo, el chef niega la mala calidad de la comida de su restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: El chef Ramsay visita Anna Vincenzo's, un restaurante familiar en Boca Raton, Florida. Se entera de que el obstinado dueño no acepta el cambio. Después de que se ignoran sus ideas, Ramsay se marcha.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Chef Ramsay visita Fleming, un restaurante danés en Miami. El obstinado dueño no quiere actualizar el lugar y Ramsay descubre algo en la hielera que lo lleva a cerrar el restaurante.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares en español
programme.desc: Ubicado en Bellmore, Nueva York, The Mixing Bowl enfrenta una afluencia de competencia y apenas tiene clientes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1995, the founder of American Atheists disappeared with one of her sons, her granddaughter and $500,000 in gold coins. The police investigated several suspects, including David R. Waters, who worked for American Atheists.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, Indiana police identified Richard Alexander as the “River Park Rapist” who assaulted four women that year. Later, DNA analysis casts doubt on his conviction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A police officer accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide. Investigators say it was murder — that it was physically impossible for the woman to have shot herself.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Young Navajos in the Southwest were dying at an alarming rate. The tribe's medicine men provided investigators with a critical clue that would lead halfway around the world to a most unlikely killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The device is so powerful that it embedded shrapnel in houses across the street. The bomber had not only knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1998, a Maryland murder mystery performance turns into a real whodunit when the badly burned body of Stephen Hricko is discovered in his hotel room.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1988, the body of a young woman was discovered in an Ohio river. Most of the evidence had been washed away, but the victim's 6-year-old son unwittingly told investigators all they needed to know — without saying a word. The clue was in his genes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Susie Mowbray was charged in her husband's death. Her son was so convinced of her innocence that he enrolled in law school, studied all of the evidence and, eventually, discovered the truth of what really happened between his parents.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Soon after organizing a workers' strike, a union official is executed in his home. Neither his wife nor anyone in the neighborhood hear any gunshots. It takes a forensic sound test, an electron microscope and a nightgown to explain why.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Casino security cameras tracked a young woman's movements until shortly before she disappeared. She was never seen again, but through the evidence she left behind, she was able to tell investigators what happened to her and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When investigators found Bruce Miller dead in the office of his junkyard business, the crime scene was almost pristine. But when a computer forensics expert examined computers owned by the victim's wife and her lover, he found all the evidence needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The body of a young girl was discovered on isolated farmland near Delano, California. She had no ID, but police found mailbox keys in the pocket of her jeans. With no other clues, they checked the mailboxes of every apartment building in Delano.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, the dead bodies of Joan Rogers and her two teenage daughters were found floating in Tampa Bay.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue — a flaw on a mailing envelope — exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On May 20, 2001, Carrie Nelson was beaten to death while working alone in a park office. The case went unsolved for six years. Finally, police found a match with DNA samples gathered from the crime scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A neighbor watched as a man stabbed his wife, pushed her into the swimming pool and held her head under water. The husband, however, had no recollection of the crime. A jury would have to decide between evidence and the mysteries of the mind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When convenience store employee Wanda Mason is found dead, investigators find the entire murder has been caught on the store's security camera. But the image of the killer is so degraded it seems impossible to positively identify him.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her. Fibers on her clothing would prove she was telling the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When an elderly couple died in a suspicious house fire, their son became the prime suspect. Investigators turned to forensic science to determine if the fire had been set deliberately, or if it was an unfortunate accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Survivors of Nazi atrocities recognized Archbishop Trifa, former head of the Romanian Orthodox Church in America, as having directed a bloody attack against Jews during World War II. He was deported in 1984 and died three years later.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young woman disappeared, police feared she was the latest victim in a string of similar crimes. A pair of bloody gloves, unique tire tracks and ordinary pine needles provided investigators with some extraordinary clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On a windy Kansas night in 1995, a mysterious fire swept through the home of a prominent doctor. In the debris, investigators found evidence which told them how the fire started.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Ronny runs into a stubborn obstacle named Will while trying to throw a Halloween party. When she is captured to power Moltor and the Fearcats's latest weapon, can Will steal her back?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Norg and Will strike a strange alliance in their attempt to find the Fearcats' secret hideout. The equally strange alliance between Moltor, Mig and Benglo appears to be leading to the defeat of the Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Mig and Benglo use the power of the Octavian Chalice, and unleash the mighty Agrios, a giant robotic creature that proves to be stronger than all the Rangers' Zords!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: While the other Rangers continue to be outmatched by the Fearcats and Agrios, Tyzonn begins to accept his fiance Vella's claims that he was never a Power Ranger.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using Mack's internal CPU to replay highlights from their Ranger careers, the team take the time to refresh their memories as to who has the Corona Aurora jewel.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: Using the Octavian Chalice, the Rangers journey to Greece in an attempt to find the next jewel via an ancient ritual. But Kamdor and Miratrix interrupt the ceremony, making their ultimate stand against their enemies!

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: The Rangers return to Egypt, then travel to Japan, and back again, all in their heated quest to find the key to unlock the last hidden jewel. But despite the ground covered, is it actually closer to home than they realize?

programme.title: Power Rangers: Operation Overdrive
programme.desc: With the ultimate power of the completed Corona Aurora at his disposal, Flurious freezes all of San Angeles and prepares to conquer the world in his new form. The Rangers must use their powersl to make their final stand against him.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The friendship between Theo and Lily is tested by the Yellow Ranger's budding platonic relationship with Casey.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: The heavily armored Pangolin proves to be too tough of a nut for the Rangers to crack. Their only hope is a powerful weapon called the Jungle Mace, which lies in the hands of retired Pai Zhuq teacher, Master Phant.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Theo spreads his focus too thin, leading his teammates to question his effectiveness in battle.

programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Curtain Call
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Joliet, Illinois to investigate the Rialto Square Theater, which is becoming known for being more than just an entertainment venue.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Fear Factory
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Claremont, New Hampshire to investigate a former shoe and furniture factory, the Topstone Mill. What was once an abandoned space has now become a restaurant and bar...

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Tunnels of Terror
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Lockport, New York to investigate an underworld of tunnels. It holds a mystery of possible murder, multiple deaths and frightening phenomena. What stories do the spirits of Lockport Caves want to tell?

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Paranormal Pioneers
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Gloucester, Massachusetts to investigate Hammond Castle.

programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS travels to Bowling Green, Kentucky to investigate Western Kentucky University's three stories of death and terrifying paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Haunted Home for the Holidays

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Permanent Residents

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: All Ghosts On Deck

programme.desc: The aspiring chefs must cut a steak, cook it to medium-rare and then serve it with a spice rub or sauce of their own making. The winners spend the afternoon lounging around a pool.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen

programme.desc: Representatives from both teams have thirty seconds to gather as many slips of paper as they can while in a wind chamber. The teams must cook five dishes based on the ingredients listed on the slips.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: The Ricardos and the Mertzes, on the last leg of their NY-to-Hollywood motor trek, stop at Ethel's hometown of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Under the impression that Ethel has been called to Hollywood by the movies, the townsfolk give her the star treatment.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea, and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie’s birthday, they soon discover that it’s not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie, who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia, and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht, but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia’s grandparents’ ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor’s barn. The girls promise to raise money to rebuild it, and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: When Stephanie becomes obsessed with beating her rival Tanya in a float building contest and accidentally disregards Emma’s ideas and design, Tanya convinces Emma to join her team to get revenge on Stephanie.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: When Olivia’s Aunt Sophie is getting married and the groom has gone missing in the jungle, the girls fly out to the jungle in secret to try to find him in time for the wedding.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: When famous pop star Livi comes to Heartlake City to judge a talent show, our five friends Olivia, Mia, Andrea, Emma, and Stephanie all decide to enter

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: The five friends leave for science camp that takes place on an island and during the trip. They meet the stand-offish Kate — but they soon realize that there’s more to her than meets the eyes and that you shouldn’t judge the book by its cover.

programme.title: LEGO Friends
programme.desc: The five friends help out at The Grand Hotel that Andrea’s family just bought during what was supposed to be a quiet weekend until a hotel critic arrives unexpectedly…

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una borrachera, el Abuelo y el Noruego atropellan con su coche a Santa Claus justo antes de la Navidad. Para no dejar a los niños sin regalos, el Abuelo toma el lugar del accidentado.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar les restringe el dinero al Abuelo y al Noruego ocasionando que el Noruego tenga que consumir un licor hecho en casa por Peluzín lo que lo deja ciego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego no cumple con sus responsabilidades con la casa por lo que es expulsado por Gaspar. El Noruego se embarca en una travesía sin saber que lleva un ángel guardián. Segunda parte.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar atraviesa una crisis en su periodo de entrenamiento en Estados Unidos, mientras que el resto de la familia decide alcanzar a Gaspar

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo necesita un trasplante de riñón y ninguno de los Del Barrio es compatible para donarle uno. Sin embargo, Peluzín tiene la solución en sus manos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una persona del pasado del Abuelo reaparece en su vida. El Noruego tiene problemas dentales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Salubridad clausura el Tenta-Culo e Irma consigue trabajo como empleada domestica en el departamento de los Del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo encuentra la manera de aprovecharse del sistema de seguros a costa de Peluzín. Mientras Gaspar les encarga al Noruego y a Jonathan que recojan en el aeropuerto a un familiar que viene de visita de los Estados Unidos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se enamora de la estatua de cera de Ivanka Trump y toda la familia decide hacer un viaje y atravesar todo el país en auto hasta Nueva York.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Rachelle cree que su novio, Chris, puede estar siendo infiel con unas 50 mujeres, ¡incluyendo a su hermana! Entonces, Carrie se sorprendió al descubrir que su novio, Chris, mintió sobre su servicio militar.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Michael dice que él y Britny no tuvieron relaciones sexuales lo suficiente como para que ella quedara embarazada. Shekeita y su hermana Natasha están aquí para demostrar que Kieary es el verdadero padre del bebé de Shekeita.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: El propio hermano de Terrazina, Tyson, cree que Simon no es el padre. ¿Probará Tyson que ella fue infiel y que Simon no es el padre de su hija? Después, William tendrá un acalorado debate con dos mujeres sobre la paternidad de sus hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Toni y Quintin regresan para averiguar quién es el padre de su hijo. ¡Esta vez se preguntarán si Toni fue infiel! ¡Jenny tiene que saber si su hijo es de su esposo o de su amiga! Finalmente, ¿Vivian pondrá fin a la búsqueda de su hijo de 30 años?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Maurio dice que no es padre de 5 hijos. Cuando se revelen los cinco análisis, ¿se demostrará que tiene razón o será un perdedor? ¡La familia de Jon dice que él no es el padre del bebé de Courtney! ¿Los resultados de la prueba dirán lo contrario?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿La esposa del pastor Terry lo engañó con 200 hombres diferentes? A continuación, Naomi quiere averiguar si su prometido, Jesse, es un infiel. ¿Qué revelarán los resultados en Maury hoy?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Kiki y su hermana Sad-e aseguran que el novio de Kiki, Tavon, es un infiel. ¿Qué dirán cuando aparezca en nuestra cámara oculta? Entonces, ¿los hijos de James y Nikkie son realmente suyos?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Keisha sabe que Desmond es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero él la quiere fuera de su vida! Después, dos madres desesperadas se enfrentan al padre de sus tres hijos.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: La furiosa mamá Patty quiere demostrar que el novio de su hija, Dale, un hombre que duplica la edad de su hija, ha sido infiel. ¿Entonces Bam fue infiel a Brianna en su propia cama?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Grace, la madre de Eddie, no los va a dejar vivir con ella a menos que Kay Kay pueda demostrar que su hijo, Eddie, es el padre de su nieto. Después, Troy niega ser el padre de los cinco hijos de Vanessa.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Estas mujeres han venido con preguntas urgentes! Kendra quiere que su esposo Richard admita que es el padre de su hijo Y del hijo de su amante! ¡Jevon y su familia no creen que él sea el padre del hijo de Jazmine! ¡Solo MAURY tiene las respuestas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: En el episodio de hoy de MAURY, estos hombres dicen que saben que la prueba de paternidad demostrará lo que siempre han sabido: que no son padres de los hijos de las mujeres que los trajeron aquí. ¡Ellas van a demostrar que están equivocados!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Centavia sospecha que su novio Richard la engaña con Kheisha, la niñera. Después, Kristy le revelará 2 secretos a su novio Matt que podrían terminar su relación. ¡Descubre estos secretos impactantes hoy!
